title: init_db() runs on every request via before_request
evidence: app.py:76-79 @app.before_request ensure_tables() calls init_db() which opens a new sqlite3 connection and runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on every request
suggestion: Call init_db() once at startup instead of per-request to avoid the extra connection/DDL on every call

title: Year validation beyond spec (0-2100 range + integer check)
evidence: app.py:66-72 validates year is an int in [0,2100]; TASK.md only lists title/author as required
suggestion: None — this is a reasonable enhancement, noted for cross-run comparison

title: PUT supports partial updates and preserves unspecified fields
evidence: app.py:168-171 defaults title/author/year/isbn to existing values when omitted; test_update_book_success asserts year unchanged
suggestion: None — noted as behavior beyond the minimal spec
